members.name: value
members.description: A unique value that associates the trigger with a content.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the tab.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

members.name: value
members.description: A unique value that associates the content with a trigger.

members.name: forceMount
members.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed.

Useful when controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The controlled value of the tab to activate. Can be bind as `v-model`.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The value of the tab that should be active when initially rendered. Use when you do not need to control the state
of the tabs

members.name: activationMode
members.description: Whether a tab is activated automatically (on focus) or manually (on click).

members.name: unmountOnHide
members.description: When `true`, the element will be unmounted on closed state.

members.name: dir
members.description: The direction of navigation between items.

members.name: loop
members.description: Whether keyboard navigation should loop around

members.name: orientation
members.description: The orientation of the group. Mainly so arrow navigation is done accordingly (left & right vs. up & down)

callables.name: update:modelValue
callables.description: Event handler called when the value changes

slots.resolvedType: { trigger?: ((props: T & { active: boolean; }) => any); content?: ((props: T & { active: boolean; }) => any); indicator?: (() => any) }
